profile.name: notebooklm-py

intro.title: notebooklm-py
intro.desc: A Comprehensive NotebookLM Skill & Unofficial Python API.** Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

install_hints: **Why `uv tool` / `pipx`?** They install the CLI into its own isolated environment and put `notebooklm` on your `PATH` — no dependency clash
uv add notebooklm-py                    # or, inside a virtualenv: pip install notebooklm-py

detalle.avoid_if: ya tienes una herramienta equivalente o no encaja con tu stack actual
